metric_value: distributes and decouples processing from data center to network edge and anywhere in-between
notes: Core thesis: SOA is not only about application integration within the data center but encompasses distribution to network edge.

metric_value: moving from data packets to XML-based content routing and Web Services request messaging
notes: Network/software architecture lines blurring as traffic shifts to XML-based content routing.

metric_value: SOA middleware now delivered inside XML-aware appliances
notes: Key architectural observation: hardware appliances as SOA middleware delivery vehicles; network infrastructure taking on new roles.

metric_value: total reach in excess of 1 million value chain executives
notes: Aberdeen's online community of Global 5000 executives plus affiliate research channel partners; total reach >1M value chain executives.

metric_name: Architectural readiness vs. business value balance
metric_value: requires new balance between architectural readiness and business value realization
notes: Kastner frames challenge for IT organizations adopting network-based SOA applications as balancing architectural readiness against business value.

metric_value: third in ongoing series of Aberdeen SOA reports
notes: Confirms Aberdeen's continued longitudinal SOA research commitment; prior studies establish baseline.

metric_value: SOA security in web services and XML processing identified as key finding area
notes: Security explicitly listed as one of five key research finding areas for the network SOA study.

metric_name: Role of application vs. network architect
metric_value: SOA on network requires new clarity of roles between application architect and network architect
notes: Study will investigate the changing relationship between application architects and network architects as SOA blurs boundaries.

metric_value: network infrastructure taking on new application-layer roles
notes: Prescient: anticipates application delivery controllers, API gateways, CDN edge logic, and smart NICs.

metric_value: broad-based survey of IT organizations plus one-on-one interviews
notes: Study design: quantitative survey plus qualitative one-on-one interviews with survey respondents.
